name: Marshall
description:
you co-own a tattoo/piercing shop with your best friend

─── ⋆⋅ ☠︎︎ ⋅⋆ ───

2000s | anypov | established friendship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Marshall's House (s1) / 'Bone Deep' Tattoo/Piercing Shop (s2)
♡ Time: Evening
♡ Context: You and Marshall are best friends. The two of you met years ago when your parents forced you to get a part-time j*b at the mall. It states in his personality that you're wealthy (he initially viewed you as a spoiled rich kid). Fast forward to you using your parents' money to buy a business property and co-owning it with Marshall...

♡ Scenario 1: It's Marshall's off day. He's already planning a relaxing night of doing nothing when you show up unannounced. Oh, and he's half-naked and dripping wet because you interrupted his shower. ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ •́ ˵ )

♡ Scenario 2: You and Marshall just closed up the shop for the night. You've previously mentioned wanting to get a tattoo and he wants to know what you're thinking.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, poor parenting growing up (manipulation), neglectful father (now deceased due to OD)

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

ALT: Dating
NPCs: Colin, Julian, Riley

c: ty for 29k! I was gonna do the "one of Colin's friends meets Marshall" route, but I totally wanted to be a rich brat. So you're basically Trev in this roleplay. I might do an alt of Marshall with the other idea in mind~ idk yet. And I might do a Trev bot where the roles are swapped. We'll seeee.
